title: The Pale Garden Remastered
description: The Pale Garden that actually makes it look and feel like the official trailer.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba122ce32dad4b806aeee117a22d5ee6f30501b_0.webp)

## 📖 Description This datapack revamps the newly added Pale Garden and makes it a truly scary place while keeping the vanilla Minecraft look and original feeling from the Minecraft trailers.

## 📦 Content - **Revamp of the Pale Garden biome itself.**
The biome has new trees that are both taller and placed in a more forest-like way.
More types of blocks have been added to make it more haunted.
The biome size has been increased.
- **The Creaking mob with better loot and AI.**
The Creaking is now harder to fight because it deals more damage, has more health, and moves a lot faster, making it the perfect mob for its environment.
The Creaking now has three variants of itself and can spawn more Creakings on its own.
The variants are: The Baby Creaking, The Creaking, and The Elder Creaking.
Each one has its speed, health, and damage values changed accordingly.
The Creaking now actually drops some loot.
- **Ambient sounds and particle effects.**
When entering the Pale Garden, you will immediately hear a storm gathering above you. You will constantly see rain particles, hear eerie ambient sounds, and hear the Creaking when it is closing in on you.
All this while, most light is blocked by the new fog that is spreading in the Pale Garden. This fog makes the surroundings harder to see, truly making it feel more like what the Minecraft trailer for the Pale Garden intended.
All Sounds and Effects can be configured in the in-game chat menu.
Use `/trigger ThePaleGardenRemastered` to open the menu.
You need operator permissions to change the settings. ## Preview ## ⚙️ Installation - Unzip the datapack. - Place it in the datapack folder when creating a new world. - Make sure the title, description, and icon show up. - Create the new world. ## 🎗️ Credit Huge credit to EMD123 and the Better Trees datapack for the Pale Garden Trees.
